NFL & Fantasy Sports
Free with AiNFL GM — No account required
Fantasy Draft Strategy Agent
FREE
Analyzes your league settings, scoring format, and draft position to generate a round-by-round strategy. Adapts to PPR, half-PPR, and standard.
★★★★★
(4.9 · 312 uses)
Claude ChatGPT Gemini
Trade Evaluation Agent
FREE
Evaluates any fantasy trade proposal using player projections, target share, and schedule strength. Returns a clear win/lose/neutral verdict.
★★★★★
(4.8 · 489 uses)
Claude ChatGPT Gemini
Waiver Wire Scout Agent
FREE
Scans waiver wire targets by week, roster needs, and opponent matchup. Ranks pickups by upside, floor, and immediate impact.
★★★★☆
(4.7 · 271 uses)
Claude ChatGPT Gemini
Injury Impact Analyst Agent
FREE
Breaks down how a player injury reshapes target distribution, backfield usage, and lineup decisions for the affected team and your roster.
★★★★★
(4.9 · 198 uses)
